attacking_style: Launches decisive moves on the final categorized climb with 10-15km remaining, then uses technical descending skills to consolidate gaps rather than pure power on the climb itself.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team tactics pattern. Appears to have freedom for late-race opportunism.
terrain_preference: Ardennes-style finales combining punchy climbs (1-2km) followed by technical descents where bike handling skills can compound advantages gained on the ascent.
vulnerability: Unknown - limited observations available. Single race data insufficient to identify recurring weaknesses.
key_patterns: Attacks on final climb with 10-15km to go, not waiting for sprint finish
Uses descending ability as tactical weapon to shed climbers who matched uphill effort
Peaks successfully for Monuments following consistent spring classics podium sequence
form_trajectory: positive: demonstrated Monument-winning form in spring 2019 following deliberate peaking through earlier classics podiums
